summary: Vertical video. A re-post of the narrated USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA ('Finding registration information'), with stock B-roll of a border checkpoint, a fingerprint, a classroom, and typing under a full voiceover, captioned text, and an ARR logo end card. The narration explains who must register and states criminal and civil penalties. On-screen and spoken text includes 'Security is making sure all aliens', '14 years or older', 'If you are a parent', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION', and 'and civil penalties.'
notable_text: Security is making sure all aliens; 14 years or older; If you are a parent; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION; and civil penalties.
